overview: A modern personal portfolio website for Swarit Sawarkar — a 15-year-old robotics champion, coder, and content creator. Showcases achievements, projects, skills, and experience designed to impress college admissions teams.
features: Hero section with animated gradient and personal tagline
Achievements showcase with badges and icons
Projects section featuring Chess AI, MUNIFY, and book-in-progress
Skills breakdown across programming, media, and leadership
Chronological timeline of experiences and events
Contact section with all social links
